must_have.constraint: Deep technical depth in modern ML systems (embeddings, retrieval, ranking, LLMs, fine-tuning) combined with a scrappy product-engineering attitude (shipping quickly, learning from users).

sub_constraints.item: Deep technical depth in modern ML systems
Scrappy product-engineering attitude / bias for shipping

must_have.constraint: Ability to own and drive Redrob's intelligence layer, specifically ranking, retrieval, and matching systems.
Production experience with embeddings-based retrieval systems, including operational aspects like handling drift, index refresh, and quality regression.

sub_constraints.item: Production experience with embeddings-based retrieval systems

must_have.constraint: Production experience with vector databases or hybrid search infrastructure, focusing on operational experience.

sub_constraints.item: Production experience with hybrid search infrastructure

must_have.constraint: Strong Python programming skills with an emphasis on code quality.
Hands-on experience designing evaluation frameworks for ranking systems (NDCG, MRR, MAP, offline-to-online correlation, A/B test interpretation).

sub_constraints.item: Designing evaluation frameworks for ranking systems

must_have.constraint: General applied ML/AI experience (4-5 years) in product companies, shipping end-to-end systems at scale.

sub_constraints.item: Shipped at least one end-to-end ranking, search, or recommendation system

must_have.constraint: Willingness to mentor new hires and engage in cross-functional collaboration with product managers.
Ability to set up and drive the long-term architecture of candidate-JD matching at scale.
Comfort with fast-paced, evolving environments, open disagreement, quick decisions, and strong written communication.
Location in Pune/Noida, India (Hybrid) or willingness to relocate from Tier-1 Indian cities, with flexibility for quarterly travel.

sub_constraints.item: Willingness to relocate from Tier-1 Indian cities
Willingness for quarterly travel for offsites

must_have.constraint: Evidence of being active in the job market and available for communication.

sub_constraints.item: Clear signal of being in the job market

preferred.constraint: LLM fine-tuning experience (LoRA, QLoRA, PEFT).
Experience with learning-to-rank models (XGBoost-based or neural).
Prior exposure to HR-tech, recruiting tech, or marketplace products.
Background in distributed systems or large-scale inference optimization.
Open-source contributions in the AI/ML space.
Notice period of less than 30 days.

rejection.constraint: Career spent at large tech companies (Google, Meta) seeking well-scoped roles with defined ladders.
Career spent 'just coding' at early-stage startups without product/workflow/evaluation thinking.

sub_constraints.item: Unwillingness to think about product workflows
Unwillingness to think about evaluation frameworks

sub_constraints.item: Unwillingness to think about product workflows
Unwillingness to think about evaluation frameworks

rejection.constraint: Career in pure research environments (academic labs, research-only roles) without production deployment experience.

sub_constraints.item: Lack of any production deployment experience

rejection.constraint: AI experience primarily consisting of recent (under 12 months) LangChain/OpenAI projects without substantial pre-LLM ML production experience.

sub_constraints.item: AI experience primarily calling OpenAI APIs
Lack of substantial pre-LLM-era ML production experience

rejection.constraint: Senior engineer who hasn't written production code in the last 18 months due to architecture/tech lead roles.

sub_constraints.item: Haven't written production code in last 18 months

rejection.constraint: Career spent entirely at consulting firms (TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, Capgemini, etc.) without prior product company experience.
Primary expertise in computer vision, speech, or robotics without significant NLP/IR exposure.

negative.constraint: Framework enthusiasm or focus on superficial usage rather than system design.

sub_constraints.item: Focus on frameworks rather than systems thinking

negative.constraint: Work entirely on closed-source proprietary systems for 5+ years without external validation (papers, talks, open-source).

sub_constraints.item: Work entirely on closed-source proprietary systems for 5+ years
Lack of external validation (papers, talks, open-source)

negative.constraint: Notice period of 30+ days without exceptionally strong other signals.

sub_constraints.item: Insufficient other strong signals to compensate for long notice period

negative.constraint: Career trajectory indicating 'title-chasing' (e.g., switching companies frequently for title upgrades).

sub_constraints.item: Lack of intent for 3+ years tenure

must_have.constraint: Deep technical depth in modern ML systems (embeddings, retrieval, ranking, LLMs, fine-tuning) combined with a scrappy product-engineering attitude (shipping quickly, learning from users).

sub_constraints.item: Deep technical depth in modern ML systems
Scrappy product-engineering attitude / bias for shipping

must_have.constraint: Ability to own and drive Redrob's intelligence layer, specifically ranking, retrieval, and matching systems.
Production experience with embeddings-based retrieval systems, including operational aspects like handling drift, index refresh, and quality regression.

sub_constraints.item: Production experience with embeddings-based retrieval systems

must_have.constraint: Production experience with vector databases or hybrid search infrastructure, focusing on operational experience.

sub_constraints.item: Production experience with hybrid search infrastructure

must_have.constraint: Strong Python programming skills with an emphasis on code quality.
Hands-on experience designing evaluation frameworks for ranking systems (NDCG, MRR, MAP, offline-to-online correlation, A/B test interpretation).

sub_constraints.item: Designing evaluation frameworks for ranking systems

must_have.constraint: General applied ML/AI experience (4-5 years) in product companies, shipping end-to-end systems at scale.

sub_constraints.item: Shipped at least one end-to-end ranking, search, or recommendation system

must_have.constraint: Willingness to mentor new hires and engage in cross-functional collaboration with product managers.
Ability to set up and drive the long-term architecture of candidate-JD matching at scale.
Comfort with fast-paced, evolving environments, open disagreement, quick decisions, and strong written communication.
Location in Pune/Noida, India (Hybrid) or willingness to relocate from Tier-1 Indian cities, with flexibility for quarterly travel.

sub_constraints.item: Willingness to relocate from Tier-1 Indian cities
Willingness for quarterly travel for offsites

must_have.constraint: Evidence of being active in the job market and available for communication.

sub_constraints.item: Clear signal of being in the job market

preferred.constraint: LLM fine-tuning experience (LoRA, QLoRA, PEFT).
Experience with learning-to-rank models (XGBoost-based or neural).
Prior exposure to HR-tech, recruiting tech, or marketplace products.
Background in distributed systems or large-scale inference optimization.
Open-source contributions in the AI/ML space.
Notice period of less than 30 days.

Career spent 'just coding' at early-stage startups without product/workflow/evaluation thinking.
